title: Corpus-driven test harness + per-(model,subset) embedding cache

deliverables.layout_choice: Dedicated corpus_harness.rs wrapping corpus_subset via nested `#[path]` + `pub use` re-exports (the campaign's 'first-class harness' that PR-6/PR-7 consume), rather than inlining into corpus_subset.rs. Migration diff stayed small (1 mod line + use line per caller).
deliverables.additive_seam: tests/support/corpus_subset.rs: added VaryingEmbedder::with_identity (new() now delegates to it); production EmbedderIdentity contract untouched.

api_surface: CorpusFixture::per_source(n) — Pack-4-compatible (== load_subset_or_skip(n)); used by migrated vector/fts tests
CorpusFixture::from_docs(label, docs) — explicit doc set (used by graph migration + tests)
with_real_embedder() [cfg default-embedder, SKIPs gracefully when off] / with_synthetic_embedder()
ingest_into(&Engine) -> IngestReport {nodes, edges, edges_by_relation, embed_cache_hit, embedded_live, cache_miss_reason, cache_path}

cache.gitignored_by: existing /data/corpus-data/ rule (verified git check-ignore; absent from git status)
cache.key_recipe: sha256(identity.name \0 identity.revision \0 identity.dimension \0 subset_label \0 doc_manifest_sha)  where doc_manifest_sha = sha256(sorted+deduped doc_ids, newline-joined)
cache.blob_format: LE [u32 format_version][u32 dim][u32 entry_count] then per-entry [32-byte text-sha256][f32 x dim]; entries SORTED by text digest => byte-deterministic; atomic .tmp->rename
cache.sidecar: meta.json: format_version, tool_version, identity{name,revision,dimension}, subset_label, doc_manifest_sha, dim, entry_count
cache.invalidation: identity (name/rev/dim) change OR subset doc-id-manifest change => different key => rebuild. Present-but-stale (key match, meta mismatch) AND partial (blob XOR sidecar) => loud Err.
cache.loud_miss: EVERY miss (cold / partial / stale) emits `CORPUS_CACHE_MISS reason=… label=… path=…` AND sets observable IngestReport.cache_miss_reason; hit path re-verifies identity+manifest+format before trusting bytes; a miss never fails the test (falls through to live embed).

migrated_no_behavior_change: corpus_vector.rs (per_source-equivalent docs via load_subset_or_skip + same filter, then from_docs)
migration.deferred: eu7_real_corpus_ac.rs NOT migrated (bespoke SerializedBge Mutex holdover) — follow-up for PR-6/PR-7. Harness real path needs NO Mutex (PR-9 serializes engine-side); noted in code.
migration.test_binary_count: 3 Pack-4 binaries preserved (vector/fts/graph) + 1 new (corpus_harness). No binary collapsed.

tests.corpus_harness_invariants: PASS (cold miss loud, asserts vec0/fts/search helpers, queries never verbatim)
tests.corpus_harness_determinism: PASS (two constructions => byte-identical blob; warm re-read is a genuine hit)
tests.corpus_harness_cache_invalidation: PASS (identity-change, subset-change, cold, partial, stale-manifest [1c], stale-identity [1d] — both stale branches independently locked)
tests.corpus_harness_real_embedder_smoke: ADDED, gated behind default-embedder + AGENT_LONG=1 (real candle weights). Validates real cold-build -> warm on-disk hit -> live search. Cache/ingest path is identical to the synthetic path (only inner Embedder differs), so it is belt-and-braces, not primary coverage.
matrix_green: default features, corpus present: 4 harness + 3 migrated GREEN

codex_review.arc: BLOCK -> BLOCK -> CONCERN -> PASS (no BLOCK overridden)
codex_review.pass1_BLOCK: silent cold/partial cache-miss (no CORPUS_CACHE_MISS) + no test locking it
codex_review.pass2_BLOCK: runtime fix confirmed; present-but-stale branch (identity/manifest mismatch) not locked by a test
codex_review.pass3_CONCERN: stale test locked only manifest-mismatch, not identity-mismatch branch
codex_review.pass4_PASS: no findings; both stale branches independently locked

honesty_notes: RED-first not strictly observed: tests + impl were authored together. The suite did catch a real bug — the invariants cold-miss assertion was hitting a warm cache left by a prior run; fixed by isolating that test to a temp cache dir.
Real-embedder ingest is validated by construction (identical cache + ingest code; only the inner Embedder differs) plus the gated smoke; the synthetic path is the executed-every-run coverage.
assert_vec0_row_count_matches_ingest opens a read-only sqlite connection on a drained (not closed) engine — WAL read-only, no writer-lock contention.

pointer_forward.PR-6: Dev-loop perf gates (perf_gates_devloop.rs, <=30s warm) consume CorpusFixture::small().with_real_embedder() directly; the embedding cache makes warm seed ~0. eu7 SerializedBge migration can share PR-6/PR-7 budget.
pointer_forward.PR-7: Perf-history regression detection — parallelizable with PR-6 once PR-5 lands.

push: NONE — campaign-wide no-push without HITL OK; PR-8 owns the next push for 0.7.2 closure.
